title: CsInH$_3$: A Perovskite Hydride Superconductor with $T_c \sim 200$~K at 3~GPa from First Principles

figures.caption: SSCHA-corrected $T_c(P)$ for CsInH$_3$ (red circles) compared with H$_3$S (blue square) and LaH$_{10}$ (green diamond). The dashed line marks 300~K. CsInH$_3$ achieves H$_3$S-class $T_c \sim 214$~K at 3~GPa --- a 30$\times$ pressure reduction.
figures.label: fig:tc_pressure

figures.caption: CsInH$_3$ characterization: (a) crystal structure (Pm$\bar{3}$m perovskite), (b) phonon dispersion (harmonic vs SSCHA), (c) Eliashberg spectral function $\alpha^2F(\omega)$ and cumulative $\lambda(\omega)$, (d) $T_c$ vs $\mu^*$ sensitivity.
figures.label: fig:candidate_summary

figures.caption: Pipeline validation: computed vs experimental $T_c$ for H$_3$S and LaH$_{10}$ benchmarks. Error bars show the $\mu^* = 0.10$--$0.13$ bracket.
figures.label: fig:benchmark
